---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "Feature: [Short description of the feature]"
labels: enhancement
assignees:

---

# Feature Request

## Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of how you think this feature should work.

## Benefits
Explain the benefits this feature would bring to the project and its users.

## Alternatives Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or examples related to the feature request here.
